title: Keep Graphiti/Zep temporal-validity scoring provider-blocked until current and historical facts return

encoding.reason: Graphiti/Zep representative temporal-validity scoring requires explicit provider configuration before Docker-local Graphiti can return current, historical, and rationale facts with validity windows.

follow_up.title: Run Graphiti/Zep temporal-validity job with explicit provider config
follow_up.reason: The representative job can score only after Graphiti search output maps current and historical validity-window facts to generated evidence ids.

items.text: Graphiti/Zep representative contract: a current fact must carry a validity window and map to the generated current evidence id.

locator.quote: a current fact must carry a validity window

items.text: Graphiti/Zep representative contract: a historical fact must remain queryable as historical instead of being presented as the current fact.

locator.quote: a historical fact must remain queryable as historical

items.text: Graphiti/Zep blocker: the live temporal smoke is provider-bound and must report provider_api_key_missing when explicit credentials are absent.

locator.quote: must report provider_api_key_missing when explicit credentials are absent

answer.content: Graphiti/Zep temporal scoring requires current and historical facts with validity windows. The representative adapter output remains blocked until provider-backed temporal search maps those facts to generated evidence ids.

claims.text: Graphiti/Zep temporal scoring requires current and historical facts with validity windows.

trace_explainability.failure_reason: provider_api_key_missing blocks live temporal search output, so the fixture records the current/historical validity-window contract instead of scoring parity.

stages.notes: The typed blocker still names the current and historical source ids required before scoring.
Missing explicit provider configuration is a valid typed blocker, not a failed ELF graph-memory comparison.

timeline.summary: Graphiti/Zep representative scoring requires current and historical validity-window facts.

prompt.content: Score Graphiti/Zep temporal validity only when current and historical facts with validity windows are returned.

must_include.text: Graphiti/Zep temporal scoring requires current and historical facts with validity windows.

must_not_include: Graphiti/Zep temporal validity passes without provider-backed output.
ELF beats Graphiti/Zep temporal graph memory.

required_evidence.quote: a current fact must carry a validity window
a historical fact must remain queryable as historical
must report provider_api_key_missing when explicit credentials are absent

lifecycle_behavior.criteria: Must distinguish current and historical validity windows before scoring.

answer_correctness.criteria: Must preserve the provider-backed temporal boundary.

evidence_grounding.criteria: Must cite current, historical, and provider-boundary evidence.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Must not report historical facts as current.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true

temporal_validity.follow_up: Run the provider-backed Graphiti/Zep temporal smoke and map validity windows to evidence ids.
